name: Strike Torch
description: A wooden rod with one end covered in flammable chemicals
effect: Provides 1 hour of bright light, can be ignited by scraping against any surface

name: Field Rations
description: Dried seeds, bread, and preserved meats wrapped into stackable packets
effect: Consume as a Snack or part of a Meal

name: Rope
description: A coil of 50ft of sturdy rope

name: Lantern
description: A glass lantern protected by a metal frame
effect: Provides 1 hour of bright light

name: Lantern, Bullseye
description: A directional lantern
effect: Provides 1 hour of directional bright light

name: Lantern Oil
description: A flask of flammable oil for lanterns
effect: Refill a used lantern or douse something in flammable liquid

name: Prybar
description: A sturdy metal crowbar
effect: d6, Pry open containers and most doors

name: Bivouac
description: An all-weather tent and bedroll for one
effect: Required to rest in inclement weather

name: Cooking Kit
description: Pot, firestarter, and utensils for cooking meals
effect: Required to create warm meals during a rest

name: Canteen
description: A metal canteen for water
effect: Required to regain Guard outside of combat

name: Delver's Pack
description: A leather backpack with plenty of pouches and loops to store equipment
effect: Waterproof. Drop all stored items at once
special: The first backpack you equip does not use up an inventory slot

name: Delver's Compass
description: A spherical compass with indicators for cardinal directions and a depth gauge
effect: Separate needles that always point towards the surface and always point towards due north. Displays current depth below sea level.

name: Headlamp
description: An Aetherstone lamp that attaches to a headband or helmet
effect: Provides 1 hour of bright directional light, recharges in sunlight for 4 hours

name: Arcane Focus
description: A bracer, wand, staff, crystal, or orb that channels Arcane power
effect: Required to cast Arcane spells

name: Divine Focus
description: A holy symbol, staff, or totem for a specific Deity that channels Divine power
effect: Required to cast Divine spells

name: Grappling Hook
description: A sharp metal hook that can be fastened to a rope or cable
effect: Can be anchored to most rough surfaces

name: Climbing Kit
description: Pack containing 100ft Rope, Grappling Hook, Pitons, Crampons, and Hammer
effect: Gain a Boon to Action Rolls made to Climb

name: Extendable Ladder
description: A 4ft metallic device that can extend into a thin 20ft ladder
effect: Can be extended and climbed or used to cross gaps

name: Smokepowder Grenade
description: A small handheld metallic grenade
effect: Fills a Zone with smoke, obscuring line of sight

name: Delver's Flare
description: A stick of flammable chemicals wrapped in wax paper
effect: Provides 15 minutes of bright light that can also ignite flammable substances
special: Purchased 3 at a time for 1 Req

name: Chemlight
description: A glass tube of luminescent chemicals protected by a metal frame
effect: Provides 1 hour of bright light, choose the color
special: Purchased 5 at a time for 1 Req

name: Lumen Paint
description: Luminescent paint in small canisters
effect: Used to mark paths and hazards
special: Purchased 3 at a time for 1 Req

name: Extendable Pole
description: A 3-foot metallic rod that can be extended into a 10-foot pole
effect: d6, 2H

name: Wedgejack
description: A metal wedge and lever jack
effect: Slowly lift heavy objects a few feet or pry open sealed doorways

name: Tent
description: An all-weather tent for up to 4 Folk
effect: Required to rest in inclement weather

name: Sanctioned Curio
description: A random Curio from the Guild armory
effect: Gain a random Prototype Magitech, Ancient Magitech, or Divine Curio

name: Grappleshot
description: A metallic tube with grip and built-in winch mechanism.
effect: Fire an alchemical glue anchor that sticks to any surface or creature, trailing up to 50 feet of rope. The rope can be retracted using the winch mechanism. Can be fastened to a harness. 3 uses.

name: Waterproof Journal
description: A 50 page journal and pen enclosed in a waterproof case.

name: Sample Recovery Kit
description: Vials Small Jars, Scalpel, forceps, iron filings, and preservatives
effect: Holds up to 3 samples from flora or fauna

name: Filter Mask
description: A leather mask with goggles and filtration system, covers the wearer's face.
effect: Protects the wearer from toxic fumes

name: Breather Mask
description: A leather mask and mouthpiece connected to a metal canister.
effect: Provides up to 1 hour of oxygen to the wearer and protects them from toxic fumes for the duration. Can be used underwater.

name: Manipulator pole
description: A collapsable 10ft pole with a mechanical claw
effect: Allows the user to interact or pick up things up to 10 feet away, including hazardous material.

name: Breaching Bomb
description: Several sticks of explosive powder with a timer mechanism
effect: Stick to a surface and set the timer for up to 15 minutes. Explodes in a 2d8 Blast. Good for breaking reinforced doorways or collapsing tunnels.
special: Only available to 2nd years and above

name: Caltrops
description: A satchel of triangular metal spikes
effect: Scatter across a Zone. Any creature that enters the zone and would be affected stops its movement and takes d4 Speed damage.

name: Bearjaw Trap
description: A mechanical device with a pressure plate and heavy spring jaws that clamp down when triggered
effect: Place in a Zone. If triggered by a creature size Large or smaller, that creature takes d8 Speed damage and is Restrained.

name: Tripwire Kit
description: A spool of thin, nearly invisible wire and various spare mechanical parts
effect: Use with other items, traps, or Curios to activate them when the tripwire is triggered

name: Timepiece
description: A tiny, round clock with intricate gears and springs.
effect: User always knows what time it is and can set timers or use as a stopwatch.
